leads.name: Asma Parveen
leads.title: Business Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Asma Parveen contacted RupeeBoss seeking a 50 lakh business loan for her organic oil and spice food factory. The agent, Riya, gathered Asma's details and business information. Due to the business being only six months old, Riya suggested a Working Capital Loan instead of an Unsecured Business Loan, detailing its features. Asma confirmed she has the required documents (turnover, credit score, bank statements, GST, ITR) and is ready to proceed. Riya will check her eligibility and provide updates.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: I'm looking for a business loan, ma'am.
[AGENT]: Great! I'd be happy to help you with that. Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and keep you updated on upcoming loan schemes?
[USER]: Asma Parveen, 9620551047
[AGENT]: Thank you, Asma. I've noted your details. Could you please let me know what type of business you're running and the loan amount you're looking for? This will help me suggest the best option for you.
[USER]: I'm having food factory, organic oil spices and I'm looking for 50 lakh only.
[AGENT]: Thank you for sharing, Asma. For your organic oil and spice food factory, we offer an Unsecured Business...
[USER]: Yes.
[AGENT]: Great! For your business, we can consider an Unsecured Business Loan of up to 50 lakhs. The interest rate ranges from 15.99% to 19%, depending on your turnover and credit profile. The loan tenure can be up to 36 months. To proceed, we’ll need your business’s last two years of ITR, bank statements, and GST returns. Would you like me to guide you through the next steps?
[USER]: I'm having six month back new business set up.
[AGENT]: I see, Asma. Since your business is relatively new, we may need to explore options that suit your current stage. For businesses with less than a year of operation, we recommend checking eligibility for a Working Capital Loan or a CGTMSE Loan, which are designed for startups and MSMEs. These can help you manage day-to-day operations and grow your business. Would you like me to provide more details on these options?
[USER]: Okay, ma'am.
[AGENT]: Perfect, Asma. Let me share a bit more about the Working Capital Loan—it’s ideal for new businesses like yours. It offers funding from 50 lakhs to 100 crores, with interest rates between 9% and 12%, and a tenure of 6 months to 5 years. Since your business is less than a year old, we’ll focus on your turnover, credit score, and bank statements. I ca

leads.name: अमित कुमार सेथ
leads.title: Personal Loan Agency Program
leads.summary: The user, Amit Kumar Seth, wants to become a loan agent for his jewelry shop customers. The agent, Riya, explains the benefits of RupeeBoss's agency program, including commission, document assistance, and quick approvals. Amit provides his name and phone number. Riya confirms she will send a detailed document and a video link about the program within 24 hours.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: मैं अपने कर्टमोरों का पर्सनल लोन करना चाहता हूँ, बटालों के सिलिका सकता हूँ और किन्या कमिस्यन मिलेंगे.
[AGENT]: नमस्ते! आपके लिए बहुत अच्छी खबर है। रूपीबॉस के पर्सनल लोन के लिए आपको निम्नलिखित जानकारी चाहिए:

- लोन राशि: 1 लाख से लेकर 75 लाख तक  
- ब्याज दर: 10.25% से 14% (आपकी कंपनी कैटेगरी और मासिक नेट आय पर निर्भर)  
- लोन की अवधि: 12 महीने से लेकर 60 महीने तक  
- प्रोसेसिंग फीस: 0.50% से 2%  
- न्यूनतम आय: 30,000 रुपये से अधिक  
- क्रेडिट स्कोर: 680 या उससे अधिक  

क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और मोबाइल नंबर बता सकते हैं? इससे हम आपको आगे के लोन स्कीम्स के बारे में अपडेट कर सकते हैं।
[USER]: मुझे लोन नहीं लेना, मैं अपने कस्टमरों को लोन दिलाना चाहता हूँ, मेरी ज्वैलरी की सौब है, इसलिए मैं अपने कस्टमरों के लिये पर्सनल लोक करना चाहता हूँ,
[AGENT]: समझ गई, आप अपने कस्टमर्स के लिए पर्सनल लोन के लिए एजेंट बनना चाहते हैं। बहुत अच्छा विचार है! आपके लिए रूपीबॉस ने विशेष एजेंसी स्कीम्स भी तैयार की हैं।

क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और मोबाइल नंबर बता सकते हैं? इससे हम आपको एजेंसी प्रोग्राम के बारे में विस्तार से बता सकते हैं, जिसमें आपको कमीशन, बोनस और लोन देने के लिए आसान प्रक्रिया मिलेगी।

आपके लिए बहुत अच्छा अवसर है!
[USER]: इसका बताओ. मेरा नام अमित कुमार सेथ है, मॉبयल नंбर है 7355-93-8580.
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, अमित कुमार सेथ जी। मैंने आपका नाम और मोबाइल नंबर सफलतापूर्वक स्टोर कर लिया है।

आपके लिए रूपीबॉस के एजेंसी प्रोग्राम के तहत निम्नलिखित लाभ हैं:

- आप अपने कस्टमर्स के लिए पर्सनल लोन अप्लाई कर सकते हैं।  
- आपको लोन के आधार पर कमीशन मिलेगा (कमीशन राशि लोन के आकार पर निर्भर करती है)।  
- आपको लोन के लिए आवश्यक दस्तावेजों की मदद मिलेगी।  
- आपको लोन के लिए त्वरित अप्रूवल और डिस्बर्सल की सुविधा मिलेगी।  

हम आपको अगले 24 घंटों में एक विस्तृत एजेंसी प्रोग्राम डॉक्यूमेंट भेजेंगे। आपको बस अपने नंबर पर एक मैसेज देखना होगा।

क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं आपको एजेंसी प्रोग्राम के बारे में एक छोटा वीडियो लिंक भी भेजूँ?
[USER]: हाँ,
[AGENT]: बहुत अच्छा, अमित जी। मैं आपको एजेंसी प्रोग्राम के बारे में एक छोटा वीडियो लिंक भेज रही

leads.name: Sarita
leads.title: Balance Transfer Loan Application
leads.summary: Sarita inquired about the procedure for a balance transfer loan. Riya requested Sarita's name and phone number, then outlined the required documents: existing loan details, loan statement, and KYC documents. Sarita agreed to submit the documents. Riya provided instructions for submission and offered further assistance. Sarita expressed satisfaction, and the call was ended.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: I've already gained the information of balance transferring loan. What the procedure to take that?
[AGENT]: Great! To proceed with a balance transfer loan, I'll need your name and cell phone number so we can guide you through the process and notify you about upcoming schemes. Could you please share those details?
[USER]: Yes, my name is Sarita. The mobile number is 6374-335-772.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Sarita. I've noted your details. To initiate the balance transfer loan process, we'll need the following:  
1. Your existing loan details (lender name, loan type, current interest rate, and outstanding amount).  
2. A copy of your latest loan statement.  
3. Your KYC documents (Aadhaar, PAN, and recent passport-sized photo).  

Once you share these, we’ll process your application and help you switch to a lower EMI. Would you like to proceed with submitting these documents now?
[USER]: Yes.
[AGENT]: Great, Sarita! Please send your existing loan statement and KYC documents (Aadhaar, PAN, and a recent passport-sized photo) via email or through our secure portal. Once received, our team will review them and get back to you within 24 hours with the next steps.  

Is there anything else you’d like to know about the balance transfer process?
[USER]: I have lots of information from you.
[AGENT]: I'm glad I could help, Sarita! If you need any more information in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!

leads.name: Sarita
leads.title: Balance Transfer Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Sarita inquired about a balance transfer loan. Riya from RupeeBoss explained the process and requested Sarita's loan details. Sarita provided her name, number, outstanding loan amount (1,30,000), EMI (30,000), and salary (45,000). Riya confirmed the details and said she would check for the best offers, prioritizing faster processing and a longer tenure.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: A balance transferring loan. I want to know the balance transferring loan.
[AGENT]: A balance transfer loan with RupeeBoss allows you to transfer your existing loan—such as a personal loan, business loan, home loan, loan against property, or working capital loan—to us if you're currently paying a higher interest rate. This helps you enjoy lower EMIs and better repayment terms. The process is quick and hassle-free, and we work with multiple banks and NBFCs to get you the best offer.  

Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you further and keep you updated on upcoming loan schemes?
[USER]: Okay, what's the procedure to take the loan?
[AGENT]: To apply for a balance transfer loan with RupeeBoss, here’s how the process works:  

1. Share your current loan details, including the lender, outstanding amount, interest rate, and EMI.  
2. Provide your personal and financial information, such as your name, phone number, income proof, and credit score.  
3. We’ll check your eligibility and match you with the best available offer from our network of banks and NBFCs.  
4. Once approved, we’ll guide you through submitting the required documents, which may include your ID proof, bank statements, and loan sanction letter.  
5. After document verification, your loan will be transferred, and the new EMI will be set at a lower rate.  

Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you with the next steps?
[USER]: I'm Sarita. My mobile number is 6374-335-772.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Sarita. I’ve noted your details: Sarita, with the mobile number 6374-335-772.  

I’ll now check the best balance transfer loan options available for you based on your current loan details. Could you please share the following?  
- The current lender of your loan  
- The outstanding amount  
- Your current interest rate and EMI  

This will help me get you the most suitable of

[AGENT]: வணக்கம், நான் ரியா. இன்று உங்களுக்கு எப்படி உதவலாம்?
[USER]: தனிபட்ட கடன்.
[AGENT]: தனிப்பட்ட கடனுக்கு வரவேற்பு! நீங்கள் தொடர்ந்து கடன் பெற விரும்புகிறீர்களா? முதலில், உங்கள் பெயரையும் மொபைல் எண்ணையும் சொல்லுங்கள், நாங்கள் உங்களுக்கு கடன் திட்டங்களை பற்றி தகவல் அனுப்புவோம்.
[USER]: சரிதா 6374-335-772.
[AGENT]: நன்றி, சரிதா. உங்கள் மொபைல் எண் 6374-335-772 என பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. தனிப்பட்ட கடனுக்கான விவரங்களை பார்க்கலாம்: கடன் தொகை ₹1 லட்சத்திலிருந்து ₹75 லட்சம் வரை, வட்டி விகிதம் 10.25% முதல் 14% வரை, கால அளவு 12 மாதங்கள் முதல் 60 மாதங்கள் வரை. குறைந்த வருமானம் ₹30,000 மேல் மற்றும் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் 680 மேல் தேவை. உங்களுக்கு இது பொருத்தமாக இருக்கிறதா?
[USER]: Amen.
[AGENT]: அமைதியாக இருக்கிறது, சரிதா! உங்கள் தொடர்பு தகவல்கள் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. உங்களுக்கு தேவையான ஆவணங்கள் மற்றும் தகவல்களை தயார் செய்து கொள்ளுங்கள். நாங்கள் உங்களுக்கு மேலும் உதவி செய்ய தயாராக இருக்கிறோம். எதுவும் கேட்க விரும்புகிறீர்களா?
[USER]: ஆமாம் எனக்கு ஒரு சந்தேகம்.
[AGENT]: நிச்சயமாக, சரிதா! உங்களுக்கு எந்த சந்தேகம் இருக்கிறது என்று சொல்லுங்கள், நான் உங்களுக்கு தெளிவாக விளக்குகிறேன்.
[USER]: ஏற்கனவே லோன் நிறுந்திருந்தால், எதாவது பிராபலம் வருமா?
[AGENT]: ஆம், சரிதா! ஏற்கனவே கடன் உள்ளவர்களுக்கும் பல நல்ல வாய்ப்புகள் உள்ளன. உங்கள் தற்போதைய கடனின் வட்டி அதிகமாக இருந்தால், அதை குறைந்த வட்டி விகிதத்தில் மாற்றுவதற்கான பிராபலம் உள்ளது. இது பெயரில் "பெயர்த்தல் கடன்" (Balance Transfer Loan) என அழைக்கப்படுகிறது. இதன் மூலம் உங்கள் மாதாந்திர கடன் கட்டணம் (EMI) குறையும், மேலும் பண செலவுகள் குறையும். நீங்கள் இதை பற்றி விரிவாக அறிய விரும்பினால், நான் உதவி செய்ய தயாராக இருக்கிறேன்.
[USER]: ஏஸ், நான், தெரிந்து கொள்.
[AGENT]: நன்றி, சரிதா! உங்களுக்கு பெயர்த்தல் கடன் பற்றி தெரிந்து கொண்டீர்கள் என்பது நல்லது. நீங்கள் எந்த கடன் திட்டத்தை பெயர்த்துக் கொள்ள விரும்புகிறீர்கள் என்பதை சொல்லுங்கள், நான் உங்களுக்கு மேலும் விரிவாக விளக்குகிறேன்.

1. KYC ஆவணங்கள்:

   - பான் கார்டு (அனைத்து நிதி பரிமாற்றங்களுக்கும் அவசியம்)  
   - பாஸ்போர்ட் அளவு புகைப்படம் (சமீபத்தியது)  
   - நிறுவன அடையாள அட்டை (நிறுவனத்தின் பெயர் மற்றும் அடையாளம்)  
   - வீட்டு முகவரி சான்று (நிலையான முகவரி சான்று)

2. வருமான ஆவணங்கள்:  
   - கடந்த 3 மாதங்களுக்கான சம்பள சீட்டுகள்  
   - கடந்த 2 ஆண்டுகளுக்கான ஃபாரம் 16  
   - புதிதாக சேர்ந்த பணியாளர்களுக்கு பணியாளர் அறிவிப்பு கடிதம்

3. வங்கி கணக்கு ஆவணங்கள்:  
   - கடந்த 6 மாதங்களுக்கான சம்பள கடன் கணக்கு பின்னடைவு ஆவணம்

4. கடன் ஆவணங்கள் (இருந்தால்):  
   - கடன் அனுமதி கடிதங்கள் மற்றும் SOA (சமீபத்திய கடன் பின்னடைவு ஆவணம்)

உங்களுக்கு இந்த ஆவ

leads.name: Shreyas Ibrahj
leads.title: RupeeBoss partnership opportunity inquiry
leads.summary: The user inquired about RupeeBoss's services, including plan changes and partnership opportunities. The agent clarified that RupeeBoss focuses on loan applications and financial solutions, but can assist with loan plan adjustments. The agent confirmed partnership opportunities exist and requested the user's name and number to provide more information. The user, Shreyas Ibrahj, provided his contact information, and the agent confirmed receipt and offered to tailor partnership details.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: What does it do?
[AGENT]: RupeeBoss helps you get quick and easy loans for various needs like personal expenses, business growth, home purchases, car financing, and more. We connect you with top banks and NBFCs to offer competitive interest rates, fast approval, and hassle-free disbursal. Whether you're salaried, self-employed, or a professional, we provide tailored loan solutions to meet your financial goals. Let me know what kind of loan you're looking for, and I’ll guide you through it!
[USER]: Do even do my plan changes?
[AGENT]: I understand you're asking about plan changes, but I want to clarify that RupeeBoss specializes in helping you with loan applications, eligibility checks, and financial solutions—like personal loans, business loans, home loans, and more. We don’t handle plan changes for services like subscriptions or memberships.

If you’re referring to changing your loan plan—such as adjusting your loan amount, tenure, or repayment terms—yes, we can assist with that too, especially if you're already in the process of applying or have an existing loan with us.

Could you please clarify what kind of plan change you’re referring to? That way, I can help you better!
[USER]: Or... Can I become a partner?
[AGENT]: That’s a great question! Yes, you can become a partner with RupeeBoss. We offer partnership opportunities for individuals and businesses who want to collaborate with us in expanding financial services across India. Whether you're interested in becoming a business associate, loan referral partner, or a franchise partner, we provide training, support, and a strong network to help you succeed.

If you're interested, I’d be happy to share more details about the partnership process, eligibility, and benefits. Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can send you the relevant information and guide you further?
[USER]: My name is Shreyas Ibrahj And my number

leads.name: கலை நீஜி
leads.title: Personal Loan Application (Tamil)
leads.summary: The user wants to apply for a loan. The agent, Riya, collects the user's name and phone number. The conversation continues in Tamil. The user provides their monthly salary (₹50,000) and EMI (₹7,000) and states they don't know their credit score. Riya then lists the documents needed for a personal loan application.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: I want to get a loan.
[AGENT]: That's great! I'd be happy to help you with your loan application. To get started, could you please share your name and cell phone number? This will help us notify you about upcoming loan schemes and assist you better.
[USER]: கலை நீஜி 822-034-7977
[AGENT]: நல்லது, கலை நீஜி! உங்கள் கேள்விகளுக்கு உதவ மகிழ்ச்சி அடைகிறேன். உங்கள் கடன் தேவை என்ன? தொழிலாளர் கடன், தனிநபர் கடன், வீடு கடன் அல்லது தனியார் தொழில் கடன் போன்றவை எது?
[USER]: அண்ணி நம்பர் கதான்
[AGENT]: அது சரி, கலை நீஜி! நீங்கள் கூறிய எண் 822-034-7977 என்பதை நான் பதிவு செய்து கொண்டேன். இப்போது, உங்களுக்கு எந்த வகையான கடன் தேவை? தொழிலாளர் கடன், தனிநபர் கடன், வீடு கடன் அல்லது தனியார் தொழில் கடன் போன்றவை எது?
[USER]: தனி நபர் கடன்
[AGENT]: அருமை! தனிநபர் கடனுக்கு நீங்கள் தகுதியுடையவராக இருக்க வேண்டும். கீழ்க்கண்டவை தேவை:  
- மாத சம்பளம் ₹30,000 அல்லது அதற்கு மேல்  
- கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் 680 அல்லது அதற்கு மேல்  
- தற்போதைய மாத எம்ஐ தெரியுமா?  

நீங்கள் இந்த விவரங்களை சொல்ல முடியுமா? அதன் மூலம் உங்களுக்கு சரியான கடன் தேர்வை வழங்க முடியும்.
[USER]: இப்போ என்ன சொல்லணும் நானு
[AGENT]: அது சரி, கலை நீஜி! நீங்கள் இப்போது சொல்ல வேண்டியது என்னவென்றால்:  
- உங்கள் மாத சம்பளம் எவ்வளவு? (₹30,000 அல்லது அதற்கு மேல் இருக்க வேண்டும்)  
- தற்போது உங்கள் மாத எம்ஐ எவ்வளவு?  
- உங்கள் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் 680 அல்லது அதற்கு மேல் இருக்கிறதா? (தெரியாவிட்டால், சொல்லுங்கள்)  

இந்த விவரங்களை சொல்லுங்கள், நான் உங்களுக்கு சரியான கடன் விவரங்களை வழங்குகிறேன்.
[USER]: மாத சம்பளம் 50,000
[AGENT]: அருமை! உங்கள் மாத சம்பளம் ₹50,000 என்பது தகுதிக்கு ஏற்றது. இப்போது, தற்போது உங்கள் மாத எம்ஐ எவ்வளவு? (எடுத்துக்காட்டாக, கடன், கார் கடன் போன்றவை)  

நீங்கள் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் பற்றி தெரியாவிட்டாலும், சொல்லுங்கள் — நான் உதவி செய்கிறேன்.
[USER]: மாத இஎம்ஐ ஏழு ஆயிரம் ஏழு ஆயிரம் ரூபாய் credit score பத்தி தெரியாது
[AGENT]: அருமை! உங்கள் மாத எம்ஐ ₹7,000 என்பது சரியான விவரம். கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் பற்றி தெரியாதது சரியானது — நான் உங்களுக்கு உதவி செய்ய முடியும்.  

தனிநப

leads.name: ganja
leads.title: RupeeBoss: Business Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Riya from RupeeBoss Support greets the user in Hindi. The user provides a name ("Ganja") and phone number. The user is interested in a business loan to start a business. Riya explains the requirements for an unsecured business loan and asks if the user can provide the necessary documents. The user confirms. Riya then lists the KYC documents required for the loan application.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: चड्डी ले के आ
[AGENT]: नमस्ते! मैं रिया हूँ, आपकी रूपीबॉस सपोर्ट टीम की ओर से। कृपया मुझे अपना नाम और मोबाइल नंबर बताएं ताकि हम आपको आगामी लोन योजनाओं के बारे में सूचित कर सकें।
[USER]: मेरा नाम गंजा है।
[AGENT]: ठीक है, गंजा जी। कृपया अपना मोबाइल नंबर भी बताएं ताकि हम आपको अपडेट भेज सकें।
[USER]: गंजाने गनश्याम
[AGENT]: ठीक है, गंजा जी। कृपया अपना मोबाइल नंबर बताएं ताकि हम आपको आगामी लोन योजनाओं के बारे में सूचित कर सकें।
[USER]: six three double seven five double zero nine two three
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, गंजा जी। मैंने आपका नाम और मोबाइल नंबर सफलतापूर्वक स्टोर कर लिया है। आपको आगामी लोन योजनाओं के बारे में तुरंत सूचित किया जाएगा। क्या आपको किसी विशेष प्रकार के लोन के बारे में जानकारी चाहिए, जैसे व्यवसाय लोन, व्यक्तिगत लोन या होम लोन?
[USER]: मुझे व्यवसाय लॉन्च चाहिए।
[AGENT]: ठीक है, गंजा जी। हम आपके व्यवसाय के लिए लोन के विकल्पों के बारे में बता सकते हैं। क्या आप अपने व्यवसाय के बारे में थोड़ा अधिक जानकारी दे सकते हैं? जैसे कि आपका व्यवसाय कितने साल से चल रहा है, वार्षिक टर्नओवर क्या है, और क्या आप आय के लिए अपने व्यवसाय के लिए अपने बैंक खाते के ब्योरे उपलब्ध करा सकते हैं?
[USER]: व्यवसाय start करना है
[AGENT]: ...
[USER]: उसके लिए प्रिंडेंसी है।
[AGENT]: ठीक है, गंजा जी। आप अभी व्यवसाय शुरू करने वाले हैं, तो हम आपको एक अनसिक्योर्ड बिजनेस लोन के बारे में बता सकते हैं, जो नए उद्यमियों के लिए उपयुक्त है। इस लोन के लिए आपको निम्नलिखित आवश्यकताएं पूरी करनी होंगी:

- व्यवसाय का टर्नओवर: कम से कम ₹50 लाख  
- नेट प्रॉफिट: ₹5 लाख या अधिक  
- क्रेडिट स्कोर: 680 या अधिक  
- लोन राशि: ₹5 लाख से ₹7 करोड़ तक  
- लोन की अवधि: 12 से 36 महीने तक  

क्या आप अपने व्यवसाय के लिए अपने बैंक खाते के ब्योरे और आय के लिए आवश्यक दस्तावेज तैयार कर सकते हैं? अगर हाँ, तो हम आपको लोन के लिए आवेदन करने में मदद कर सकते हैं।
[USER]: यस
[AGENT]: बहुत अच्छा, गंजा जी। आपके व्यवसाय के लिए लोन के लिए आवेदन करने के लिए तैयार हैं, तो आपको निम्नलिखित दस्तावेज तैयार करने होंगे:

leads.name: Harikesh Kumar Sakur
leads.title: Business Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Harikesh inquired about a business loan. Initially, he asked about an unsecured loan, but then clarified he wanted a secured loan for a new business. Riya provided details on secured loan options, including amounts, interest rates, and requirements. Harikesh then mentioned a political research plan, which Riya couldn't assist with, but reiterated her availability for business loan assistance.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: This is a business loan, unsecured business loan from PNG scale.
[AGENT]: Thank you for reaching out, I can help you with that. Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and keep you updated on upcoming loan schemes?
[USER]: My name is Harikesh Kumar Sakur from Darbhanga, Bihar and my mobile number is 629108-5681.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Harikesh. I've noted your details. For an unsecured business loan, we offer amounts ranging from ₹5 lakhs to ₹7 crores, with interest rates between 15.99% and 19%, depending on the loan amount. The tenure is 12 to 36 months, and the minimum income requirement is ₹50 lakhs turnover with ₹5 lakhs net profit and above. Your credit score should be 680 or higher. Could you please confirm if you meet these criteria?
[USER]: But I want a secured loan for starting a new business.
[AGENT]: Thank you for clarifying, Harikesh. For a secured business loan to start a new business, you can leverage your property's value as collateral. We offer loan amounts from ₹30 lakhs to ₹100 crores+, with interest rates ranging from 9.35% to 12%, and tenures of 7 to 15 years. The minimum income requirement is ₹50,000+, and a credit score of 680+ is preferred. If you're interested, I can guide you through the next steps and required documents. Would you like to proceed?
[USER]: I have a political research plan that I'm going to study
[AGENT]: I'm sorry, but I can't assist with political research plans. If you need help with business loans or any other financial services, I’d be happy to assist. Let me know how I can support you!
[USER]: Okay, sure!
[AGENT]: Great! If you have any questions about secured business loans or need help with the application process, feel free to ask. I'm here to support you every step of the way.

leads.name: Tanmay Guha Niyogi
leads.title: Financial advice request
leads.summary: Tanmay contacted RupeeBoss for financial advice, specifically for educational expenses. Riya from RupeeBoss collected Tanmay's name and phone number. Riya recommended a personal or education loan, detailing loan amounts, interest rates, and required documents. Tanmay expressed interest and shared his credit score (746) to check his eligibility.

[USER]: Or something else?

[AGENT]: For educational expenses, Tanmay, I recommend our Personal Loan or Education Loan options. These are ideal for covering tuition fees, books, and other study-related costs.  

With a personal loan, you can get up to ₹75 lakhs at competitive interest rates starting from 10.25%, with a tenure of up to 5 years. We also offer flexible repayment options and quick processing—just 2 to 4 days!

- Loan Amount: ₹1 lakh to ₹75 lakhs  
- Interest Rate: 10.25% to 14% (based on your income and credit score)  
- Tenure: 12 to 60 months  
- Minimum Monthly Income: ₹30,000+  
- Credit Score Required: 680+

leads.name: Ashish
leads.title: Personal Loan Application
leads.summary: Ashish contacted RupeeBoss Support (Riya) for a personal loan. He provided his name, phone number, and income details, and confirmed he has a credit score of 920 and no existing EMIs. Riya confirmed his eligibility and listed the required documents. Ashish then asked if Riya spoke Hindi, which she confirmed. Riya offered further assistance, but Ashish thanked her, ending the conversation.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: Yeah, hi Ria. I need a loan. Can you help me process that loan?
[AGENT]: Of course, I'd be happy to help you with your loan application! To get started, could you please share your full name and cell phone number? This will help us keep you updated on the loan process and upcoming schemes.
[USER]: Yeah, my name is Ashish. My cell phone number is 9821170923
[AGENT]: Thank you, Ashish! I've noted your details. Could you please let me know what type of loan you're looking for—personal, business, home, or something else? This will help me...
[USER]: Uh...
[AGENT]: No problem at all,...
[USER]: A personal loan.
[AGENT]: Great choice, Ashish! For a personal loan, we offer amounts from ₹1 lakh to ₹75 lakhs, with interest rates starting at 10.25%. The tenure can be between 12 to 60 months. To proceed, could you please share your monthly net income and any existing EMIs you're paying? This will help us check your eligibility.
[USER]: Okay, my monthly net income is 75,000 rupees. Am I qualified for the loan?
[AGENT]: Yes, Ashish, with a monthly net income of 75,000 rupees, you definitely qualify for a personal loan! You meet the minimum income requirement of ₹30,000+ and are well within the eligible range. To move forward, could you please share your credit score, if you know it? Also, let me know if you have any existing EMIs.
[USER]: Yeah my credit score is 920. I have no EMIs right now.
[AGENT]: That’s excellent, Ashish! A credit score of 920 is very strong, and having no existing EMIs makes you an even better candidate. With your profile, you’re likely to get a competitive interest rate, possibly as low as 10.25%.  

Now, to proceed, I’ll need a few documents:  
- PAN Card  
- Aadhaar Card  
- Latest 3 months’ salary slips  
- Last 2 years’ Form 16  
- Latest 6 months’ bank statements  

Would you like me to guide you through the next steps or help you start the application?
[USER]: या आपको हि

leads.name: Sandeep Kambar
leads.title: Business Loan Inquiry Hubli
leads.summary: Sandeep Kambar contacted RupeeBoss seeking a contact person near Hubli for a business loan. Riya from RupeeBoss collected Sandeep's details and explained that while there isn't a dedicated office in Hubli, they can assist him online. Sandeep provided his business details (turnover below 1.3 CR, less than one year old, proprietorship). Riya outlined the Unsecured Business Loan option and requested his business PAN and bank statements to assess eligibility. Sandeep agreed to provide the documents.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: Contact person near Hubli.
[AGENT]: I can help you with that! Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and keep you updated on any upcoming loan schemes?
[USER]: Sandeep Kambar. Phone number 744-803-6624
[AGENT]: Thank you, Sandeep. I've noted your details. For Hubli, our nearest contact is part of our network of 100+ locations across India. While we don't have a dedicated office listed in Hubli, our team can still assist you with your loan needs through our online platform or by connecting you with a nearby representative. Would you like me to help you with a specific loan type?
[USER]: Yes.
[AGENT]: Great! Could you please let me know what kind of loan you're interested in? For example, personal loan, business loan, home loan, or something else? This will help me guide you better.
[USER]: Business loan.
[AGENT]: Perfect, Sandeep! For a business loan, we offer unsecured and secured options tailored to your needs. Could you please share your business turnover, years of experience, and whether you're a proprietor, partnership, or private limited company? This will help me find the best fit for you.

This will help us finalize your loan eligibility and next steps.

leads.name: रामकुमार मंडल
leads.title: Business Loan Inquiry (Hindi)
leads.summary: The conversation begins with the agent, Ria, offering assistance. Ramkumar Mandal identifies himself and provides his phone number. He expresses interest in a business loan for a new startup. Ria suggests an unsecured business loan but then pivots to a personal loan option after learning Ramkumar is currently employed and lacks startup capital. Ramkumar states his monthly income is ₹25,000 and he has no current EMIs. Ria confirms eligibility for a personal loan.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: हेलो
[AGENT]: नमस्ते! मैं रिया हूँ, आपकी लोन सेवाओं के लिए एक एक्सपर्ट लोन ऑफिसर। कृपया अपना नाम और मोबाइल नंबर बताएं ताकि मैं आपकी जरूरतों के अनुसार आपकी मदद कर सकूँ।
[USER]: हाँ मेरा नाम रामकुमार मंडल है
[AGENT]: बहुत अच्छा, रामकुमार जी। कृपया अपना मोबाइल नंबर भी बताएं ताकि हम आपके साथ संपर्क में रह सकें।
[USER]: सेवन जीरो फाइव जीरो, नाइन थ्री, टू थ्री, टू जीरो।
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, रामकुमार जी। मैंने आपका नाम और मोबाइल नंबर सफलतापूर्वक स्टोर कर लिया है। कृपया बताएं कि आपको किस प्रकार के लोन की आवश्यकता है? जैसे व्यवसाय लोन, व्यक्तिगत लोन, घर का लोन या कोई अन्य?
[USER]: अः बिजनेस लोन चाहिए न्यू स्टार्ट अप के लिए
[AGENT]: बहुत अच्छा, रामकुमार जी। आपके नए स्टार्टअप के लिए अनसिक्योर्ड बिजनेस लोन एक बहुत अच्छा विकल्प है। इसके लिए आपको लगभग 50 लाख रुपये से लेकर 7 करोड़ रुपये तक का लोन मिल सकता है, और ब्याज दर 15.99% से 19% तक हो सकती है। क्या आप अपने व्यवसाय के बारे में थोड़ा और बता सकते हैं? जैसे व्यवसाय का विकास कितने साल हुआ है, वार्षिक टर्नओवर और निवेश की आवश्यकता क्या है?
[USER]: अम्म बिजनेस स्टार्टअप अभी कुछ भी नहीं है मैं जॉब में हूं एक नया स्टार्टअप करना है इसके लिए मेरे पास बैलेंस नहीं है
[AGENT]: समझ गया, रामकुमार जी। आप अभी जॉब कर रहे हैं और एक नया स्टार्टअप शुरू करना चाहते हैं, लेकिन अभी तक बैलेंस नहीं है। ऐसे में आपके लिए एक अच्छा विकल्प हो सकता है एक व्यक्तिगत लोन (Personal Loan), जिससे आप अपने स्टार्टअप के लिए शुरुआती लागत पूरी कर सकते हैं।

इसके लिए आपको ₹1 लाख से ₹75 लाख तक का लोन मिल सकता है, ब्याज दर 10.25% से 14% तक, और आपकी मासिक आय ₹30,000 से अधिक होनी चाहिए। क्या आप अपनी मासिक आय और कोई अन्य लोन या ईएमआई के बारे में बता सकते हैं? इससे हम आपके लिए सबसे उपयुक्त विकल्प तैयार कर सकते हैं।
[USER]: EMI तो कुछ भी नहीं है मासिक आय लगभग twenty five thousand के पास है।
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, रामकुमार जी। आपकी मासिक आय ₹25,000 है और कोई वर्तमान EMI नहीं है, जो बहुत अच्छी बात है। इस स्थिति में, आप एक व्यक्तिगत लोन (Personal Loan) के लिए पात्र हो सकते हैं।

हम आपको ₹1 लाख से ₹75 लाख तक का लोन दे

leads.name: Unknown
leads.title: Loan information in Hindi
leads.summary: The user inquired about home loans, and the agent provided details on loan amounts, interest rates, terms, processing fees, and eligibility criteria. The user then shifted the topic to business loans, and the agent provided similar information for both secured and unsecured business loans, including loan amounts, interest rates, terms, processing fees, and eligibility requirements. The agent repeatedly asked for the user's name and phone number for a follow-up call.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: आप मुझे होम लोन के बारे में बता सकते हैं?
[AGENT]: ज़रूर, मैं आपको होम लोन के बारे में बता सकती हूँ। होम लोन राशि तीस लाख रुपये से लेकर एक सौ करोड़ रुपये तक हो सकती है। ब्याज दर आठ दशमलव तीन पांच प्रतिशत से दस प्रतिशत तक होती है, जो लोन राशि पर निर्भर करती है। इसकी अवधि सात साल से तीस साल तक हो सकती है, और प्रोसेसिंग शुल्क शून्य दशमलव दो पांच प्रतिशत से एक प्रतिशत तक होता है। न्यूनतम आय पचास हजार रुपये से अधिक होनी चाहिए, और क्रेडिट स्कोर छह सौ अस्सी से अधिक होना चाहिए।

क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और सेल फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं ताकि हम आपको बाद में कॉल कर सकें?
[USER]: नहीं आप मुझे बता सकती है business loan का क्या process है आपके यहाँ पे?
[AGENT]: ज़रूर, मैं आपको बता सकती हूँ कि हमारे यहाँ बिज़नेस लोन का क्या प्रोसेस है। हमारे यहाँ अनसेक्योर्ड बिज़नेस लोन और सेक्योर्ड बिज़नेस लोन दोनों उपलब्ध हैं। अनसेक्योर्ड बिज़नेस लोन में लोन राशि पाँच लाख रुपये से लेकर सात करोड़ रुपये तक हो सकती है, और ब्याज दर पंद्रह दशमलव नौ नौ प्रतिशत से उन्नीस प्रतिशत तक होती है, जो लोन राशि पर निर्भर करती है। इसकी अवधि बारह महीने से छत्तीस महीने तक हो सकती है, और प्रोसेसिंग शुल्क एक प्रतिशत से दो प्रतिशत तक होता है। न्यूनतम आय पचास लाख रुपये का टर्नओवर और पाँच लाख रुपये का शुद्ध लाभ होना चाहिए, और क्रेडिट स्कोर छह सौ अस्सी से अधिक होना चाहिए।

क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और सेल फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं ताकि हम आपको बाद में कॉल कर सकें?
[USER]: ...
[AGENT]: क्या आप अभी भी वहाँ हैं? क्या आप मुझे...

leads.name: Juhi
leads.title: Loan Products Information
leads.summary: Juhi inquired about the home loan process. Riya collected Juhi's name and number and provided information on eligibility criteria. Juhi then asked about other loan types, specifically car loans and their application process for self-employed individuals. Riya detailed the required documents, including KYC, business, income, and property-related documents.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: Can you tell me about the home loan process?
[AGENT]: I would be happy to assist you with information on the home loan process. To start, could you please provide your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and we can call you later?

[USER]: My name is Juhi and my mobile number is 9022612512.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Juhi.

Regarding the home loan process, are you interested in learning about the eligibility criteria, the required documents, or something else specifically?

[USER]: What is the eligibility criteria?
[AGENT]: For a home loan, the eligibility criteria include a minimum income of fifty thousand rupees and a credit score of six hundred eighty or higher. Would you like me to provide more details on any other specific requirements, such as those related to the property?

[USER]: Can you just tell me what all kind of loans you provide?
[AGENT]: We offer a comprehensive selection of loan products to cater to various needs, including home loans, personal loans, business loans, and more. We also offer car loans, car refinance loans, credit cards, working capital loans, CGTMSE loans, loans for professionals, and loan against property.

Is there any particular type of loan you're interested in?
[USER]: Can you tell me more about the car loan?
[AGENT]: Certainly! With Rupee Boss, you can finance your dream car. We go beyond just the cheapest option and tailor the best car loan to suit your needs and preferences.

Is there anything specific you'd like to know about car loans, such as eligibility, interest rates, or the application process?

[USER]: The application process?
[AGENT]: The general process involves an initial inquiry where our team assists you with loan options, document submission, verification by our experts, and then loan disbursal upon successful approval.

To give you more specific information, are you currently employed or self-employed?

[USER]: I'm a self

leads.name: Rajesh

leads.summary: Rajesh contacted RupeeBoss Support to consolidate his business and personal loans, totaling 3 lakhs, and requested an additional 2 lakhs, for a total loan of 5 lakhs. [USER]: Hi, I want to collate some of my loans into a single loan. So can you help me with that?
[AGENT]: I would be happy to help you with that! Consolidating your loans into a single loan can simplify your finances and potentially lower your interest rate.

To assist you better, could you please provide your name and phone number? Also, what types of loans are you looking to consolidate such as personal loan, business loan, or home loan?

[USER]: Yes, business loan and personal loan.
[AGENT]: Okay, great! We do offer balance transfers for both personal and business loans, which sounds like what you're looking for.

Could you please provide your name and phone number so I can assist you further?

[USER]: Rajesh 96 00 00 2565
[AGENT]: Thank you, Rajesh.

To proceed with your balance transfer request, could you share a few more details?

For the personal loan and business loan you're looking to consolidate, could you provide the outstanding amounts, interest rates, and the names of the lenders for each loan? This information will help me find the best options for you.

[USER]: It's in small app loans and the total amount will be some 3 lakhs and I need a loan of 5 lakhs.
[AGENT]: Okay, Rajesh. So you're looking to consolidate your existing small app loans totaling around three lakhs and also need an additional two lakhs, bringing the total loan amount to five lakhs. Is that correct?

To find the best option for you, could you clarify whether you're self-employed or salaried? This will help me determine the most suitable loan product for your needs.

[USER]: Self-employed.
[AGENT]: Thanks Rajesh!

For self-employed individuals, we offer unsecured business loans ranging from five lakhs to seven crores. The interest rate typically ranges from fifteen point ninety nine percent to nineteen percent, depending on the loan amount.

To check your eligibility, could you please provide your company or firm'

leads.title: Supermarket Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Riya from RupeeBoss is assisting Rinku Pyarelal with a loan to start a supermarket in Pune. Rinku wants a loan of at least 35 lakh rupees and is open to using his Dehradun property as collateral. Riya explained the difference between a Loan Against Property (LAP) and an Unsecured Business Loan, including interest rates and loan amounts. Rinku prioritizes quick access to cash, a low interest rate, and government support.

leads.name: प्रवीण सिंह देवरा
leads.title: Startup Loan Inquiry (Hindi)
leads.summary: Praveen Singh Devra contacted Ria seeking a startup loan of three crore for his company, Skybridge Inzicon Private Limited, which operates in the oil and gas field. The company has shown significant growth with a turnover of 9-10 crore in the initial 16-17 months and an expected turnover of 15-20 crore this year. Praveen has a history of taking loans and consistently paying EMIs. His current monthly EMI payments amount to two lakh rupees.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: मुझे startup loan की जरूरत है।
[AGENT]: ज़रूर, मैं स्टार्टअप लोन के बारे में आपकी मदद कर सकती हूँ। क्या आप कृपया मुझे अपना नाम और फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं? इससे मुझे आपकी आवश्यकताओं को बेहतर ढंग से समझने में मदद मिलेगी।
[USER]: मेरा नाम प्रवीण सिंह देवरा है, मेरा मोबाइल नंबर 8291262077 है।
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, प्रवीण जी। स्टार्टअप लोन के लिए आपकी क्या आवश्यकताएं हैं? क्या आप कृपया अपने व्यवसाय के बारे में कुछ और जानकारी दे सकते हैं, जैसे...
[USER]: मेरे company में startup की जरूरत है, मेरे company का name skybridge inzicon private limited है, जो service job कियती है oil and gas field में, इसका registered कियोंकि अभी 16-17 month हुआ है और उसमें अभी तक हमने 16-17 month महिन्नमे 9-10 crore तक का sale हुआ है
[AGENT]: यह बहुत अच्छा है, प्रवीण जी। आपकी कंपनी के बारे में जानकारी देने के लिए धन्यवाद। क्या आप कृपया मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आपको कितने लोन की आवश्यकता है और आप उस लोन का उपयोग कैसे करेंगे?
[USER]: मुझे तीन करोड़ की आवश्यकता है और मुझे यह पैसा और नए job लेने के लिए जरूरत है जो मेरा अः business बढ़ा सके और नए और ज्यादा job मैं कर सकूं उसके लिए मुझे चाहिए capital।
[AGENT]: तीन करोड़ की राशि आपके व्यवसाय को बढ़ाने के लिए एक अच्छी पूंजी हो सकती है। क्या आप कृपया मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आपकी कंपनी का वार्षिक टर्नओवर कितना है और आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर क्या है?
[USER]: मेरा कंपनी का लास्ट ईयर तो तीन ही महीना था, उसमें एक करोड़ है और ये साल का हमारा पंद्रह से बीस करोड़ तक का टर्नओवर है।
[AGENT]: बहुत बढ़िया, प्रवीण जी। और आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर क्या है? यदि आपको अपना क्रेडिट स्कोर पता नहीं है, तो क्या आप मुझे बता सकते हैं कि क्या आपने पहले कोई लोन लिया है और क्या आप नियमित रूप से ईएमआई का भुगतान करते रहे हैं?
[USER]: हां, मैंने लोन लिए है पहले, अनसिक्योर्ड लोन भी लिए है और होम लोन, व्हीकल लोन सब लेकिन नियमित रूप से EMI गया है।
[AGENT]: यह जानकर अच्छा लगा कि आपका भुगतान इतिहास अच्छा रहा है। इससे लोन प्राप्त करने की संभावना बढ़ जाती है। क्या आप कृपया मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आपके पास अभी कितनी मासिक ईएमआई हैं?
[USER]: मासि

leads.name: Viraj Vohraa
leads.title: Loan for medical expense
leads.summary: Viraj contacted RupeeBoss Support (Riya) to inquire about a "postal loan," which Riya didn't understand. Viraj clarified he was looking for a loan for medical expenses. Riya suggested a personal loan, outlined the terms, and asked for income details. Viraj stated his income was 26,000, which is below the minimum for a personal loan. Riya offered to share details on other loan options.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: Hello.
[AGENT]: Hi there! I'm great, thanks for asking! To assist you better, could you please share your name and cell phone number? This will help me personalize our conversation and ensure we can follow up with you effectively.
[USER]: My name is Viraj Vohraa
[AGENT]: ...
[USER]: 1940, Chhattisgarh, 224.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Viraj! Just to confirm, is your cell phone number one nine four zero, Chhattisgarh, two two four? Also, could you please specify what you need help with today?

[USER]: Postal loan.
[AGENT]: I am sorry, I do not understand. Could you please clarify what type of loan you're asking about?

[USER]: Postal loan.
[AGENT]: I'm sorry, Viraj, I'm still not quite sure what you mean by "postal loan." Could you please describe what this loan is for, or perhaps provide another name for it? This will help me find the right information for you.

[USER]: Loan.
[AGENT]: Okay, Viraj. I understand you're interested in a loan. RupeeBoss offers a variety of loans, including personal loans, business loans, home loans, and loans against property.

To help me narrow down the best option for you, could you tell me what you plan to use the loan for?

[USER]: Medical expense.
[AGENT]: Thank you for letting me know, Viraj. For medical expenses, a personal loan might be a suitable option. With our personal loans, you can borrow from one lakh to seventy-five lakh rupees with interest rates from ten point twenty-five percent to fourteen percent, depending on your company category and monthly income. The repayment period can be from twelve months to sixty months.

To see if you qualify, could you please share your monthly net income, your existing monthly EMI, and your work experience? If you know your credit score, that would be helpful too!

[USER]: 26 thousand.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Viraj. Just to confirm, is your monthly net income twenty-six thousand?

Please note that the minimum income for

leads.name: Shehzad
leads.title: Business Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Shehzad contacted RupeeBoss Support (Riya) seeking a ₹50,000 business loan. Shehzad provided his name and phone number. He confirmed his annual turnover is ₹10 lakhs and he has 5 years of business experience. His credit score is 650 and monthly EMIs are ₹10,000. Riya suggested an unsecured business loan and started to explain eligibility criteria, but made an error. Riya then asked about the company's structure, but Shehzad switched to Hindi. Riya apologized for not speaking Marathi and asked if he could speak in Hindi. Shehzad responded with "Huh."
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: I'm looking for a loan of 50,000.
[AGENT]: Okay, I can help you with that! To assist you better, could you please provide your name and cell phone number? Also, what type of loan are you interested in?

[USER]: My name is Shehzad and my phone number is 452-981-467.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Shehzad. Just to confirm, your phone number is four five two, nine eight one, four six seven. What type of loan are you interested in?

[USER]: Business loan.
[AGENT]: Great. We offer a variety of business loans. Are you self-employed, and do you have any idea about your company's annual turnover?

[USER]: Yes.
[AGENT]: Okay, great. Could you please share your company's annual turnover and your business experience in years? This will help me find the most suitable business loan for you.

[USER]: Annual turnover should be around 10 lakhs.
[AGENT]: Thank you for that information, Shehzad. Just to confirm, is that ten lakhs rupees? Also, how many years of business experience do you have?

[USER]: Yes it is rupees and it is 5 years.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Shehzad. Based on your annual turnover of ten lakhs rupees and five years of business experience, an unsecured business loan might be a good option for you. To proceed, do you know your credit score? Also, what is your existing monthly EMI, if any?

[USER]: My credit score is 650 and my monthly EMIs are 10000 rupees.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Shehzad. Given your credit score of six hundred fifty and existing monthly EMIs of ten thousand rupees, you might be eligible for an unsecured business loan. These loans range from five lakhs to seven crores with interest rates from fifteen point ninety nine percent to nineteen percent, depending on the loan amount. Would you like me to provide more details on the eligibility criteria and required documents?

[USER]: Yes.
[AGENT]: Certainly! To be eligible for an unsecured business loan, we would need to verify a few details. Coul

leads.title: Unsecured Business Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: The user inquired about unsecured business loans, specifically eligibility criteria and required documents. The agent provided the eligibility criteria, including turnover, profit, and credit score requirements. The agent then asked for the business type to provide a relevant document list. After the user confirmed it was a proprietorship, the agent listed the required documents, including KYC, business KYC, income documents, bank statements, GST returns, and loan documents. The agent then asked if the user had any further questions.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: Unsecured business loan.
[AGENT]: Okay, I can help you with information about unsecured business loans. To assist you better, could you please provide your name and cell phone number? Also, can you tell me what information you're looking for regarding the unsecured business loan? For example, are you interested in eligibility criteria, required documents, interest rates, or something else?

[USER]: Eligibility criteria and required documents.
[AGENT]: Great! For an unsecured business loan, the eligibility criteria include things like your company or firm's turnover, existing monthly EMI, business experience, and credit score. The minimum income should be a turnover of fifty lakhs rupees, with a net profit of five lakhs rupees and above, and a credit score of six hundred eighty or higher.

As for the required documents, they vary depending on whether you have a proprietorship, partnership, or private limited company. Could you please specify which type of firm you have so I can provide the relevant document list?

[USER]: I have own business of electronics and furniture.
[AGENT]: Thank you for that information. To clarify, is your business a proprietorship? If not, could you please specify whether it's a partnership, private limited, or limited company? This will help me provide you with the correct list of required documents.

[USER]: Proprietorship.
[AGENT]: ...
[USER]: Proprietorship
[AGENT]: Okay, great. For a proprietorship, the required documents for an unsecured business loan typically include KYC documents, business KYC, income documents, bank statements, GST returns, and loan documents if applicable.

Specifically, you'll need:

One, KYC Documents: PAN card, Aadhaar card, photo, office address proof, and rent agreement if rented, or ownership proof.

Two, Business KYC: Business license and GST certificate.

Three, Income Documents: Last two years' ITR with financial and audit rep

leads.name: Dr. Sudhir Sharma
leads.title: MSME Loan Information Request
leads.summary: Dr. Sharma contacted RupeeBoss Support, inquiring about MSME loans and government schemes for his pet boarding, pet shop, and import-export business. The agent gathered information about his business and mentioned the MSME Bharat Manch initiative. Dr. Sharma requested a call, and corrected a mistake in his phone number.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you...
[USER]: Call me
[AGENT]: I can definitely assist you with that! Before we proceed, could you please provide your name and cell phone number so I can arrange a call for you?

[USER]: My name is Dr. Sudhir Sharma and my phone number is 981056444.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Dr. Sudhir Sharma. I have your name and number. What is the reason for the call today?

[USER]: MSME loan and other government schemes.
[AGENT]: Great! We have the MSME Bharat Manch, which is a nationwide initiative to address the challenges faced by Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises in India.

To better assist you with MSME loans and other government schemes, could you please provide a little more detail about your specific needs or questions?

[USER]: Yes, tell me.
[AGENT]: I'd be happy to! To give you the most relevant information, could you tell me what kind of information you're looking for regarding MSME loans and government schemes? For example, are you interested in eligibility criteria, the application process, or specific schemes?

[USER]: Specific schemes.
[AGENT]: Okay, I can help you with that! To provide you with the most relevant information on specific schemes, could you tell me a bit about your business? Knowing the nature of your business will help me identify the schemes that might be the best fit for you.

[USER]: Pet boarding related and pet shops and other import-export services.
[AGENT]: Thank you for that information! Based on your business, which includes pet boarding, pet shops, and import-export services, I can share some information.

RupeeBoss Financial Services Pvt Ltd has launched the MSME Bharat Manch, which aims to address the challenges faced by MSMEs by providing access to financial services, market linkages, and technology solutions. This initiative also focuses on uplifting underprivileged entrepreneurs and women-led businesses through mentorship, access to government schemes, and skill development.

leads.name: Neetu Devi
leads.title: Loan eligibility inquiry (Hindi)
leads.summary: Neetu Devi contacted Ria seeking a 2.5 lakh loan for her daughter's wedding. Ria collected Neetu's name and phone number. Neetu's individual income of 22,000 INR was below the 30,000 INR minimum for a personal loan. Ria suggested a Loan Against Property (LAP). Neetu then inquired if combining her and her husband's income would qualify them for a personal loan. Ria asked for the husband's income to determine eligibility.

[AGENT]: नीतू जी, मैं समझती हूँ। पर्सनल लोन आपकी बेटी की शादी के लिए एक अच्छा विकल्प हो सकता है। RupeeBoss पर्सनल लोन प्रदान करता है जिसका उपयोग आप अपनी बेटी की शादी के खर्चों को पूरा करने के लिए कर सकती हैं। क्या आप मुझे बता सकती हैं कि आपकी मासिक आय कितनी है और आपकी कोई मौजूदा ईएमआई है या नहीं?

leads.name: Virendra Sharma
leads.title: MSME Loan Assistance
leads.summary: Virendra Sharma, who has an existing logistic company with a turnover of around 2.5 crore, wants to expand his business and requires an MSME loan of up to 2 crore without collateral. He also wants to start repayment a year later. Agent asks for his name and phone number and asks about his credit score and how long his business has been running. Virendra confirms his business has been running for the last 5 years and his credit score is above 700. Agent confirms this makes him a good candidate for an MSME loan and offers RupeeBoss loan options.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: मेरी एक existing logistic company है जिसका की सालाला turnover around 2.5 crore के आसपास है और मुझे अब अपने business को expand करना है और मुझे MSME का loan का requirement है up to 2 crore तक बिना collateral के और मैं इसमें यह भी चाहतا हूं कि जो मैं मुझे पैसा मिले MSME के द्वारה वो मैं इसका repayment एक सال के बात start करूँ

इससे पहले कि मैं आपको सबसे अच्छी जानकारी दे सकूँ, क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं? इससे मुझे आपकी ज़रूरतों के अनुसार सही लोन विकल्प खोजने में मदद मिलेगी।
[USER]: मेरा नام Virendra Sharma है, and my mobile number is 9470599675
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, वीरेंद्र जी। आपका नाम और नंबर नोट कर लिया गया है।

मैं आपको बताना चाहती हूँ कि एमएसएमई लोन के लिए कुछ पात्रता मानदंड (eligibility criteria) होते हैं, जैसे कि कंपनी का टर्नओवर, लाभ, और क्रेडिट स्कोर। आमतौर पर, बिना किसी सुरक्षा के लोन के लिए, क्रेडिट स्कोर अच्छा होना चाहिए।

क्या आप मुझे अपनी कंपनी के बारे में कुछ और जानकारी दे सकते हैं, जैसे कि आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर क्या है और आपका व्यवसाय कितने सालों से चल रहा है? इससे मुझे यह समझने में मदद मिलेगी कि आपके लिए कौन सा लोन सबसे उपयुक्त रहेगा।

Ria offered suggestions but cannot directly intervene.

leads.transcript:

[USER]: I want to go on a vacation.

[USER]: Yeah, my credit score is 780.

[USER]: Just give me the personal loan options. I will share the details later.
[AGENT]: Okay, I can give you some general information about personal loans. leads.name: Vikram Bhargava
leads.title: Startup Funding Inquiry
leads.summary: Vikram is seeking funding (10-20 lakh rupees) for his AI startup, which is in the development phase. He's interested in a business loan or government grant. The agent, Ria, is gathering information about his company, including registration status, business plan details (projected revenue, industry sector), and desired loan type (secured/unsecured). Vikram's company is registered, has a pitch deck, operates in the AI/SaaS sector, and projects ₹50 lakh revenue next year. Ria suggests an unsecured loan might be suitable and asks for the company's specific registration type (proprietorship, partnership, etc.).

leads.name: Visal
leads.title: Commercial Purchase Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: The user, Vishal, contacted RupeeBoss seeking a loan to purchase a shop. After initial greetings and language detection, the agent, Riya, determined Vishal needed a commercial purchase loan of 6 lakh rupees. Riya outlined the loan's interest rates and terms, then inquired about Vishal's eligibility, including business duration, credit score, and annual turnover. Vishal confirmed he met the criteria and possessed the necessary documents. Riya then began to explain the application process through RupeeBoss.

leads.name: Baslinga Pugoda Patil
leads.title: Loan for agricultural land
leads.summary: Baslinga contacted RupeeBoss seeking a loan to purchase agricultural land. Riya gathered Baslinga's name and number, and determined he's an agriculturist. Initially, Baslinga requested a loan against property using agricultural land as collateral, but RupeeBoss doesn't offer that. Baslinga then shifted to wanting a home loan despite a low CIBIL score. He stated his annual income is 10 lakh rupees and he has no existing EMIs. Riya started to explain about home loan.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: Help me to get loan to purchase agricultural land.
[AGENT]: I can certainly help you with information on loans. To assist you better, could you please provide your name and cell phone number? Also, can you clarify what type of loan you're looking for to purchase agricultural land? For example, are you looking for a specific type of business loan or a loan against property?

[USER]: My name is Baslinga Pugoda Patil. Mobile number is 9916554411. I need loan to purchase agricultural land.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Baslinga. I have your name and number.

To assist you with the best options, could you please provide a few more details?

Are you self-employed or salaried? Also, do you have any existing business or is this a new venture?

[USER]: I am an agriculturist
[AGENT]: Thanks for the information.

To find the most suitable loan for purchasing agricultural land, could you please tell me if you are looking for a business loan or a loan against property? Also, do you have any existing agricultural business?

[USER]: I need loan against property.
[AGENT]: Okay, a loan against property can be a great option. With Rupee Boss's loan against property, you can unlock the potential of your property with competitive rates and a hassle-free process.

To proceed, can you confirm whether the property you plan to use as collateral is residential or commercial?

[USER]: It is an agricultural land.
[AGENT]: Thank you for confirming. Unfortunately, I don't have specific information about loans against agricultural land. However, I can provide information on Loan Against Property (LAP) for residential or commercial properties. Would you like to know more about that?

[USER]: I want to purchase a residential property. I need a loan but my civil score is low.
[AGENT]: I understand you're looking to purchase a residential property and need a loan, but your CIBIL score is low.

To assess your eligibility for a home

He provided his phone number and details about his existing EMIs (Rs 57,000 total) but didn't know his credit score. leads.name: Juliana
leads.title: MSME Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Juliana contacted RupeeBoss Support (Riya) to inquire about MSME loans for her recently incorporated Section 8 company. She is planning to start beekeeping, animal husbandry, and eco-friendly fertilizer production at the village level. Riya requested Juliana's name, phone number, project details, and the approximate loan amount needed to provide relevant information about MSME schemes and subsidies. Juliana stated they need funds for at least the first year of operations. Riya asked for an approximate loan amount.

leads.name: Sandeep
leads.title: MSME loan documents needed
leads.summary: Sandeep contacted RupeeBoss Support regarding a disconnected line and inquired about loan options for a startup. He was informed that a working capital loan requires one year of operational history. The agent then offered information on alternative loan products like Unsecured Business Loans, CGTMSE Loans, and MSME Schemes. Sandeep requested details on MSME schemes, and the agent provided an overview of the MSME Bharat Manch initiative and asked for clarification on whether Sandeep was interested in general schemes or a specific loan type. Sandeep confirmed he was interested in general schemes.
leads.transcript:

[USER]: Sandeep. 859-555-2010.
[AGENT]: Thank you, Sandeep. I'll look into the connection issue right away. In the meantime, is there anything else I can assist you with regarding our loan products or services?

[USER]: Working capital.
[AGENT]: Great! For a working capital loan, you'll...
[USER]: For a startup business.
[AGENT]: Thank you for the clarification! For a working capital loan for a startup, the requirements may vary slightly.

Generally, you'll need: business registration documents, bank statements for the last twelve months, audited financial statements for the last two years, GST filings, and ITR.

To give you more specific details, could you tell me how long your business has been operational?

[USER]: It will be operational on 1st of September
[AGENT]: Thank you for the information. As the minimum business vintage for a working capital loan is one year of operational history, you would need to wait until after that period.

In the meantime, would you like me to provide information on any other loan products that might be a better fit for your current situation?

leads.name: William Bharat

leads.name: Purushothaman

leads.summary: Purushothaman contacted Riya from RupeeBoss Support to inquire about a business loan. Riya asked for details about his business, including turnover, EMI obligations, business experience, and credit score. Purushothaman clarified that he helps start up new businesses, leading Riya to ask if he's seeking a loan for his company or on behalf of the new businesses.

leads.name: Abhishek
leads.title: RupeeBoss Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: The user, Abhishek, is seeking a business loan of ₹10 lakh for his supermarket. He provides his phone number, name, company turnover (₹18 lakh), existing EMI (₹1 lakh), and credit score (765). The agent, Riya, outlines the loan terms (interest rate 15.99-19%, tenure 12-36 months, processing fee 1-2%) and required documents. Abhishek indicates he needs the loan urgently and has some, but not all, of the required documents. He asks how to obtain the missing documents, and Riya begins to explain the process.
leads.transcript:

leads.name: अभिषेक को मिलना वाठे
leads.title: RupeeBoss Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Abhishek contacted RupeeBoss (via agent Ria) seeking a business loan. He provided details about his company's turnover (18 lakh), existing EMI (1.2 lakh), credit score (765), and business experience (15 years). He inquired about the difference between secured and unsecured loans and expressed interest in an unsecured loan. The agent provided information on unsecured business loans, including interest rates (15.99% - 19%), loan amounts (5 lakh - 7 crore), repayment periods (12-36 months), and processing fees (1-2%).
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: मुझे एक बिजनेस लोनी चाहिए।
[AGENT]: नमस्ते! मैं आपकी मदद कर सकती हूँ। RupeeBoss में आपका स्वागत है! क्या आप कृपया मुझे अपना नाम और सेल फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं? इससे मुझे आपकी आवश्यकताओं को बेहतर ढंग से समझने में मदद मिलेगी।
[USER]: मेरा नाम अभीशक को मिलना वाठे। मेरा नाम पोंल्यूम नंबर 997704-6268 है
[AGENT]: अभिषेक जी, आपका स्वागत है! बिजनेस लोन के बारे में जानकारी देने में मुझे खुशी होगी। क्या आप कृपया मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आपकी कंपनी का टर्नओवर कितना है, आपकी मौजूदा मासिक ईएमआई कितनी है, और आपको बिजनेस का कितना अनुभव है? इसके अलावा, क्या आपको अपना क्रेडिट स्कोर पता है?
[USER]: । मुरी स्यालान आय 18 लाख रोके है, मेरी मन्ति एकसिक्टिंग EMI 1.2 Lakh है, कोर मेरा क्रेडिट स्कोर 765 है
[AGENT]: धन्यवाद, अभिषेक जी। आपकी जानकारी के लिए धन्यवाद। क्या आप कृपया यह भी बता सकते हैं कि आपका व्यवसाय कितने सालों से चल रहा है?
[USER]: , मेरा वेबसाइट 15 सालों से चल रहा हूं लीत
[AGENT]: बहुत बढ़िया! RupeeBoss आपको बिजनेस लोन दिलाने में मदद कर सकता है। आपके व्यवसाय के अनुभव और क्रेडिट स्कोर को देखते हुए, आपके पास कई विकल्प उपलब्ध हैं। क्या आप कृपया बता सकते हैं कि आपको किस प्रकार के बिजनेस लोन में रुचि है, जैसे कि सुरक्षित या असुरक्षित बिजनेस लोन?
[USER]: । सुरक्षित और आसुरक्षित बीसिलस के जमहने में क्या अंतर है ?
[AGENT]: ज़रूर, मैं आपको सुरक्षित और असुरक्षित बिजनेस लोन के बीच का अंतर बता सकती हूँ।

सुरक्षित बिजनेस लोन में आपको लोन के बदले कुछ गिरवी रखना होता है, जैसे कि संपत्ति। इसकी वजह से ब्याज दर कम हो सकती है और लोन की राशि ज़्यादा मिल सकती है।

असुरक्षित बिजनेस लोन में आपको कुछ भी गिरवी रखने की ज़रूरत नहीं होती है, लेकिन ब्याज दर थोड़ी ज़्यादा हो सकती है और लोन की राशि आपकी क्रेडिट प्रोफाइल पर निर्भर करती है।

आपकी स्थिति के लिए कौन सा लोन बेहतर रहेगा, यह आपकी आवश्यकताओं और जोखिम लेने की क्षमता पर निर्भर करता है। क्या आप किसी विशिष्ट प्रकार के लोन के बारे में अधिक जानना चाहेंगे?

[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: What is eligibility for business loan?
[AGENT]: To determine your eligibility for an unsecured business loan, I need to collect a few details from you. Could you please provide the following information?

   Company or firm turnover
   Existing monthly EMI
   Business experience in years
   Credit score, if you know it

Also, could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better?

leads.name: ताहिर हुसेन
leads.title: RupeeBoss Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: The user, Tahir Hussain, needs an urgent personal loan of 8 lakhs for his sister's wedding. He has no prior loan history or credit score but earns 50-60k monthly as an electrical supervisor. The agent is exploring loan options for him despite the lack of credit history and asks for his patience and phone number to provide updates. Tahir requests a quick response due to the urgency.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER]: जी मैम, नमस्ते. मरानाम ताहे हुसेना है. मुझे लोन की जरूरत है. मुझे अर्जंकली लोन की जरूरत है.
[AGENT]: नमस्ते हुसैन जी, मैं रिया हूँ, RupeeBoss में आपकी लोन सम्बंधित सहायता के लिए यहाँ हूँ। क्या आप कृपया मुझे अपना नाम और फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं? और आप किस प्रकार का लोन लेना चाहते हैं?
[USER]: कि जी मेरा नाम ताहिर हुसेन है मेरा और सब्सक्राइब को सब्सक्राइब करने के लिए हों मैं जॉक करता हूं मैं प्लीज सोपोर्ट करने की खोشिस कीजिये अ
[AGENT]: ताहिर जी, क्या आप कृपया अपनी लोन की आवश्यकता को थोड़ा और स्पष्ट कर सकते हैं? आप किस प्रकार का लोन चाहते हैं, और आपको कितनी राशि की आवश्यकता है? इससे मुझे आपको बेहतर तरीके से सहायता करने में मदद मिलेगी।
[USER]: मुझे personal loan चाहिए 8,00,000 का 7 या 8,00,000 का मुझे loan चाहिए personal loan
[AGENT]: आठ लाख का पर्सनल लोन, ठीक है। क्या आप मुझे अपनी मासिक आय, मौजूदा ईएमआई, कार्य अनुभव और क्रेडिट स्कोर के बारे में जानकारी दे सकते हैं? इससे मुझे यह जानने में मदद मिलेगी कि आप पर्सनल लोन के लिए योग्य हैं या नहीं।
[USER]: जी देशक मैं अभी तक कोई EMI Pay नहीं करता हूं, और अभी-तक मैं कोई-भी bank से loan, nai liya हूं, मेरा credit generate nai hua hai, isliye mera credit generate nai show karega. Okay? मैं कोई financial EMI pay nai karta हूं. मुझे first time loan chahiye, mujhe urgently mujhe sister ke saadi karna hi hai. Kuch parasaani hai family maintain karne kariye kuch karj me hu. Mujhe urgent loan ki zarurat hai. Please.
[AGENT]: समझ गई। आपको पहली बार लोन चाहिए और क्रेडिट स्कोर भी नहीं है। आपकी सिस्टर की शादी के लिए आपको अर्जेंटली लोन चाहिए। मैं समझ सकती हूँ। क्या आप मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आप क्या काम करते हैं और आपकी मासिक आय कितनी है?
[USER]: आपकी sister की shadi केलिये, आपको urgently loan । मैं समझ सकती हूं। क्या ॐ मुझे বता सकते हैं कि ॐ क्या काम करते हैं? ॐ ֐ kí maasikai kithni hai? मैं electrical department से काम करता हूं, electrical instrument , electrical supervisor, और nursery 50 thousand है, 45-50 thousand , overtime लेकिन 60 thousand aayega every month.

leads.name: Gaurav
leads.title: RupeeBoss Loan Inquiry
leads.summary: Gaurav contacted RupeeBoss seeking a business loan. Riya, the support agent, gathered information about Gaurav's business idea and financial situation. Due to a poor credit score, an unsecured loan isn't viable. Riya suggested exploring secured loans or MSME schemes. Gaurav requested a call from a relationship manager to discuss options further. Riya scheduled the call.
leads.transcript:
[AGENT]: Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER]: And what does the bank give you?
[AGENT]: I am Riya, a support agent from RupeeBoss. I am here to provide information about our loan services and help you find the best options for your needs.

Could you please clarify what you mean by "what does the bank give you?" Are you asking about the benefits of taking a loan from a bank, or something else?

[USER]: I am looking for a loan to start a business.
[AGENT]: That's great! RupeeBoss offers a variety of business loan options. To help me recommend the best one for you, could you please share a bit more about your business plans? For example, have you already started the business, or is it just an idea at this stage? Also, what is your name and cell phone number?

[USER]: It is an idea at the moment and my cell phone number is 742-898-1002.
[AGENT]: Thank you for providing your phone number. I've made a note of it.

Since you're in the early stages of your business idea, an Unsecured Business Loan might be a good fit. These loans don't require collateral. To see if you qualify, could you share some details like your estimated company turnover, your existing monthly EMI obligations, and your business experience in years? Also, do you know your credit score?

[USER]: The credit score is poor and the monthly turnover that I'm expecting will be around 5 to 6 lakh rupees. That's all I know for now.
[AGENT]: Thank you for that information. A credit score of six hundred and eighty or higher is required to be eligible for an unsecured business loan. Also, the minimum income should be fifty lakh rupees turnover and five lakh rupees net profit and above.

Given that your credit score is poor, you might want to consider working on improving it before applying for a loan. Would you like me to provide some information on how to improve your credit score, or would you like to explore other loan options that might be available to you with your current cre

The user expresses interest in a business loan within 5-10 days. Riya asks for details, including company turnover, monthly EMI, business experience, and credit score. The user reveals a credit score of 733 and a one-month-old business.

The user expresses interest in both options. Riya begins to explain these loans further and offers to guide the user through the application process.

leads.name: Rahul Pijapati
leads.title: RupeeBoss Loan Inquiry
leads.summary:
The conversation is between Rahul Pijapati and Riya from RupeeBoss Support regarding a business loan application. Rahul expresses interest in a loan between 5 to 10 lakhs for his one-month-old business with a monthly turnover of 2-3 lakhs. Riya explains the eligibility criteria and document requirements for an unsecured business loan.

Key points discussed:
- Rahul's credit score is 733
- Unsecured business loans range from 5 lakhs to 7 crores with 15.99% to 19% interest rates
- Loan tenure is 12-36 months with a 1-2% processing fee

Riya lists required documents, but Rahul points out that some requirements, like two years of ITR and GST returns, are not applicable to his new business. Riya acknowledges this and offers to provide alternative options. The conversation ends with Rahul asking for clarification on whether personal or company PAN and Aadhaar cards are required for the application.

Tanvi provides personal details: monthly income of 1 lakh rupees, 4 years of work experience, a credit score of 780, and no existing EMIs. Riya initially suggests a loan range from 30 lakhs to over 100 crores, which confuses Tanvi. After clarification, Riya explains that the actual loan amount depends on various factors.

When Tanvi specifies a property value of 2.5 crores, Riya offers to calculate a more accurate loan estimate. Based on Tanvi's income, credit score, and property value, Riya suggests a loan amount between 80-90% of the property value.

The conversation concludes with Riya offering to guide Tanvi through the next steps of the loan application process, including gathering necessary documents such as KYC, income proof, bank statements, and property documents.
